examples: You are a dweller in my deathless dreams.
Even the most deathless love could wear out.
You are my own， my own， Dweller in my deathless dreams！
She could stir almost physical hostility in normally rational people, while she inspired deathless devotion in others.
But having become deathless, Rahu survived and to this day seeks revenge on the tattletales by devouring them.
